creator: cin_nev@mail.ru
text:
I'm having trouble building ipsec tools. When I try to update ipsec-tools with portmaster I get the following error messages:

--- crypto_openssl.o ---
crypto_openssl.c:319:10: error: incomplete definition of type 'struct X509_name_entry_st'
                if ((ea->value->length == 1 && ea->value->data[0] == '*') ||
                     ~~^
/usr/include/openssl/x509.h:73:16: note: forward declaration of 'struct X509_name_entry_st'
typedef struct X509_name_entry_st X509_NAME_ENTRY;
               ^
crypto_openssl.c:319:36: error: incomplete definition of type 'struct X509_name_entry_st'
                if ((ea->value->length == 1 && ea->value->data[0] == '*') ||
                                               ~~^
/usr/include/openssl/x509.h:73:16: note: forward declaration of 'struct X509_name_entry_st'
typedef struct X509_name_entry_st X509_NAME_ENTRY;
               ^
crypto_openssl.c:320:10: error: incomplete definition of type 'struct X509_name_entry_st'
                    (eb->value->length == 1 && eb->value->data[0] == '*')) {
                     ~~^
/usr/include/openssl/x509.h:73:16: note: forward declaration of 'struct X509_name_entry_st'
typedef struct X509_name_entry_st X509_NAME_ENTRY;
               ^
crypto_openssl.c:320:36: error: incomplete definition of type 'struct X509_name_entry_st'
                    (eb->value->length == 1 && eb->value->data[0] == '*')) {
                                               ~~^
/usr/include/openssl/x509.h:73:16: note: forward declaration of 'struct X509_name_entry_st'
typedef struct X509_name_entry_st X509_NAME_ENTRY;
               ^
crypto_openssl.c:321:22: error: incomplete definition of type 'struct X509_name_entry_st'
                        if (OBJ_cmp(ea->object,eb->object)) {
                                    ~~^
/usr/include/openssl/x509.h:73:16: note: forward declaration of 'struct X509_name_entry_st'
typedef struct X509_name_entry_st X509_NAME_ENTRY;
               ^
crypto_openssl.c:321:33: error: incomplete definition of type 'struct X509_name_entry_st'
                        if (OBJ_cmp(ea->object,eb->object)) {
                                               ~~^
/usr/include/openssl/x509.h:73:16: note: forward declaration of 'struct X509_name_entry_st'
typedef struct X509_name_entry_st X509_NAME_ENTRY;
               ^
crypto_openssl.c:433:30: error: incomplete definition of type 'struct x509_store_ctx_st'
                                X509_get_subject_name(ctx->current_cert),
                                                      ~~~^
/usr/include/openssl/ossl_typ.h:129:16: note: forward declaration of 'struct x509_store_ctx_st'
typedef struct x509_store_ctx_st X509_STORE_CTX;
               ^
crypto_openssl.c:441:14: error: incomplete definition of type 'struct x509_store_ctx_st'
                switch (ctx->error) {
                        ~~~^
/usr/include/openssl/ossl_typ.h:129:16: note: forward declaration of 'struct x509_store_ctx_st'
typedef struct x509_store_ctx_st X509_STORE_CTX;
               ^
crypto_openssl.c:456:37: error: incomplete definition of type 'struct x509_store_ctx_st'
                        X509_verify_cert_error_string(ctx->error),
                                                      ~~~^
./plog.h:70:17: note: expanded from macro 'plog'
                        _plog((pri), __VA_ARGS__); \
                                     ^~~~~~~~~~~
/usr/include/openssl/ossl_typ.h:129:16: note: forward declaration of 'struct x509_store_ctx_st'
typedef struct x509_store_ctx_st X509_STORE_CTX;
               ^

                        ctx->error,
                        ~~~^
./plog.h:70:17: note: expanded from macro 'plog'
                        _plog((pri), __VA_ARGS__); \

typedef struct x509_store_ctx_st X509_STORE_CTX;
               ^

                        ctx->error_depth,
                        ~~~^

                        _plog((pri), __VA_ARGS__); \

/usr/include/openssl/ossl_typ.h:129:16: note: forward declaration of 'struct x509_store_ctx_st'
typedef struct x509_store_ctx_st X509_STORE_CTX;
               ^
crypto_openssl.c:480:30: error: incomplete definition of type 'struct x509_store_ctx_st'

                                                      ~~~^

                        ctx->error,

typedef struct x509_store_ctx_st X509_STORE_CTX;

        len = i2d_X509_NAME(x509->cert_info->subject, NULL);
                            ~~~~^
/usr/include/openssl/ossl_typ.h:121:16: note: forward declaration of 'struct x509_st'
typedef struct x509_st X509;
               ^

        len = i2d_X509_NAME(x509->cert_info->subject, &bp);
                            ~~~~^

               ^

        len = i2d_X509_NAME(x509->cert_info->issuer, NULL);

fatal error: too many errors emitted, stopping now [-ferror-limit=]
20 errors generated.
*** [crypto_openssl.o] Error code 1

mv -f .deps/sockmisc.Tpo .deps/sockmisc.Po
